Tax-Efficient Strategies Minimize taxes with smart withdrawal sequencing. Portfolio Management Diversified portfolios aligned with your timeline. our story

Built on Trust.
Driven by Results.

Since 2010, we've helped over 500 Utah families retire with confidence — not anxiety.

meet the founder

Michael Stevens, IAR

Investment Adviser Representative & Founder

Michael was on a pre-med track when his father passed away during college. That moment changed everything — it shifted his focus from medicine to money, and sparked a mission to help families avoid the financial chaos that comes with life's biggest transitions.

He earned his BS in Business Management from Utah Valley University, got his Series 66 certification, and launched Capital Wealth Advisors in 2010. Fifteen years later, he's guided over 500 families and $500M+ in assets — all under a fiduciary standard. No commissions. No conflicts. Just honest advice.

Series 66 Certified Fiduciary Standard CA License #0G96805 JA Utah Board Member
500+ Families Served
$500M+ Assets Under Guidance
15+ Years of Experience
100% Fiduciary — Always

the team

People Who Actually Care About Your Money

Michael Stevens

Founder & Lead Advisor

15 years of fiduciary financial planning. Specializes in retirement income, tax strategy, and making sure you don't outlive your money.

BT

Brent Thompson

Advisor

Comprehensive financial planning and portfolio management. Works closely with Michael to deliver personalized strategies for every client.

why capital wealth

Three Things That Actually Matter

01

Legally on Your Side

We're fiduciaries. That means we're legally required to put your interests first — not sell you products, not hit quotas, not earn commissions. Just do right by you.

02

Retirement Is All We Do

We don't dabble. Income planning, tax optimization, Social Security timing, Medicare strategy — this is our entire focus, every day, for every client.

03

Utah Born & Raised

We know Utah tax law, Utah families, and Utah's unique financial landscape. Community board seats, local radio, youth education — we're invested here.

Ready to Talk?

No pressure. No pitch. Just a conversation about your retirement and whether we're the right fit.

Schedule a Consultation Call 801.210.2800

GET STARTED

Ready to Build Your Retirement Plan?

Start the conversation today. Initial consultations are complimentary for qualified families.
